summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: 1) Member removal API endpoint, 2) Extended grains in Indian Pantry Template, 3) Naphthalene Balls and Camphor in household items. All backend tests passed (6/6). Frontend template verification successful.
passed_tests: Backend: DELETE /api/households/{household_id}/member/{member_user_id} - Owner can remove non-owner members (200 OK)

Backend: DELETE endpoint returns 404 for non-existent member
Backend: DELETE endpoint returns 404 for non-existent household
Frontend: Indian Pantry Template contains new grains - Jowar, Bajra, Ragi, Barley, Oats, Quinoa, Buckwheat, Foxtail Millet, Little Millet, Kodo Millet, Barnyard Millet, Proso Millet, Corn Flour
Frontend: Indian Pantry Template contains Naphthalene Balls in Other Household Essentials
Frontend: Indian Pantry Template contains Camphor (Kapoor) in Other Household Essentials
Frontend: HouseholdSwitcher code correctly shows Trash2 delete button only for non-owner members when viewed by owner

Code review passed: AuthContext.removeMember correctly calls DELETE API endpoint
